title: crataegus viridis var. atrorubens
intro: Crataegus viridis var. atrorubens is a variety of the green hawthorn tree, a deciduous shrub or small tree in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to support cardiovascular health by acting as a vasodilator and lowering blood pressure. The health benefits of Crataegus viridis var. atrorubens include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving circulation, and exerting antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall cardiovascular well-being.
